summary: Tested LandingPage navigation rewrite. All features working correctly: Desktop nav with 6 section links, mobile hamburger menu, sticky nav with scroll-based background change, smooth scroll to sections, active section highlighting, and all existing content preserved.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NAV_ITEMS array defines 6 sections (hero, features, students-week, news, about, license)
VERIFIED: Desktop nav shows all 6 links with data-testid='nav-{sectionId}'
VERIFIED: Mobile hamburger button visible only on mobile (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn')
VERIFIED: Mobile menu shows all 6 items with data-testid='mobile-nav-{sectionId}'
VERIFIED: Nav is transparent over hero, becomes white/blur on scroll (scrolled state)
VERIFIED: Active section highlighted with font-bold class
VERIFIED: scrollToSection() provides smooth scroll behavior
VERIFIED: All section IDs exist: hero, features, students-week, news, about, license, cta
VERIFIED: All existing content preserved (features cards, StudentOfWeek, ContentDisplay, about, license, CTA, footer)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: LandingPage navigation fully tested. Desktop shows horizontal nav with 6 section links, mobile shows hamburger menu. Nav is sticky with transparent-to-white background transition on scroll. Active section tracking works via scroll listener. All buttons (nav-login-btn, landing-login-btn, landing-teachers-btn, cta-join-btn) navigate correctly.

verified_features.desktop_login_btn: PASSED - data-testid='nav-login-btn' visible and navigates to /login

verified_features.login_navigation: PASSED - Both nav and CTA login buttons navigate to /login
